title: EutrophicationAquaticFreshwaterFactor
description: EutrophicationAquaticFreshwaterFactor: Single value indicator for Eutrophication - Aquatic Freshwater, measured in kg P eq, refers to the natural process that results from accumulation of nutrients in fresh bodies of water.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwaterPerQuantity measured in [kg P eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
